hero.art_prompt: Riya, an 18 year old Indian girl in a modest salwar-kameez, smiling as she studies on a laptop at a tidy desk at home, bright hopeful daytime, warm and aspirational.

panels.narration: Riya's town had no college with a real BBA.
panels.dialogue: Do I have to move away?
panels.img_prompt: Riya, 18, in a modest salwar-kameez standing at her window looking toward a faraway city skyline, a BBA brochure in hand, thoughtful and hopeful, small-town Indian home.

panels.narration: Leaving home for a distant hostel felt daunting.
panels.img_prompt: Riya looking worried while glancing between a packed bag and a family photo on the wall, warm modest room, torn expression.

panels.narration: Then she found a recognised BBA she could do online.
panels.img_prompt: Riya's face lighting up with relief and excitement at a laptop showing an online BBA, warm glow, tidy home study corner.

panels.narration: Now she studies at home, her degree on track.
panels.img_prompt: Riya happily attending an online class on her laptop at home, notebook beside her, proud parents smiling in the background, warm and encouraging.

turn.title: Why An Online BBA Just Works
points: Study 100% online, anytime, from your phone or laptop. No campus, no commute.
The same UGC-entitled, NAAC A++ BBA as on-campus, recognised everywhere.
Just ₹45,000/year with 0% interest EMI, or 15% off on upfront payment.
Weekend live classes plus recordings, so learning fits around your life.

testimonials.name: Riya Menon
testimonials.quote: There was no good college in my town. Studying online let me earn a real BBA without leaving home.

testimonials.name: Sana Iqbal
testimonials.quote: The monthly EMI fit my budget, and weekend classes fit my schedule. It just worked.

testimonials.name: Divya Rao
testimonials.quote: A recognised degree earned from home. My internship team accepted it without a second thought.

testimonials.name: Meena S
testimonials.quote: I studied around my family responsibilities and still graduated on time. That flexibility changed everything.

facts.v: 100% online, learn anytime with weekend live classes
₹45,000/year (₹50,000 for Digital Mktg & Data Sci + AI)
